final:
module ring_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] count);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) count <= 5'b00001;
        else count <= {count[3:0], count[4]};
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= 5'b11111;
    end
  end

endmodule
